notes:
Same as others have reported. You need to create an OPTIONS.txt file in ~/.steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/502370/pfx/drive_c/users/steamuser/My Documents/My Games/SANCTUS/OPTIONS.txt

My content of that file is https://pastebin.com/iJh7MGAq (the previous user had spanish language activated, this one will set you up for english).

Apart from this fix, it runs perfectly. A little slow on my Intel HD620, but everything is rendering fine. Going to test this later on my GTX1070. Seems like a fun game. I completed and finished the tutorial.
title: Warhammer 40,000: Sanctus Reach
